chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-641 of 2020 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Shahryar I Awan, Assistant Advocate General ************** Respondent No.4 has filed parawise comments, same are taken on record. The record reflects that instant Constitution Petition was filed on 07.07.2020, wherein notices were ordered to be issued, and then it was lastly fixed on 18.04.2023. Thereafter, no sincere efforts have been made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. Even otherwise, none is present for the petitioner today, nor any intimation received. In these circumstances, the instant Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
